name: Small Office Internet
userQuery: I need internet for a 3-room office with 10 employees
reasoning: Context: Small office (SME segment), 10 employees → moderate bandwidth needs
Use cases: Video calls, cloud apps, general browsing → ~100-200 Mbps sufficient
Solution: "Internet" → Category: "Fiber Broadband" → PEAK tier (best value for SME)
Why: Fiber Broadband PEAK 200-400 mbps handles 10 users comfortably

recommendedItems.name: Fiber Broadband PEAK 200-400 mbps
recommendedItems.reason: Perfect for 10-person team with video calls and cloud apps. Reliable fiber with speeds for all business needs.

output.reply: For your 10-person office across 3 rooms, I recommend **Fiber Broadband PEAK 200-400 mbps**. This provides reliable speeds for video calls, cloud applications, and general browsing for your entire team. Would you like to know about pricing or add managed Wi-Fi for better coverage?

metadata.notes: Classic initial query example with clear requirements
